title: mystic staves
description: a mod that adds 6 new wandes with special pwoers like shooting fire balls or freezing your enemies or even exploding them!
body:
## ✨ Mystic Staves Mod

> 📌 **REQUIRES Just Enough Items (JEI)** to view crafting recipes!  
> Without JEI, you won’t be able to see how to craft the staves in-game.  
> 🔗 [Download JEI on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

---

**Mystic Staves** is a lightweight and exciting Minecraft magic mod that introduces **6 unique elemental staves**, each with its own special power. Whether you're a survival adventurer, a redstone trickster, or a builder who loves chaos, this mod gives you the tools to control the elements — with no complicated systems, no grinding, and no armor required.

Each staff is **crafted using a magical Elemental Core** and designed to be fun, easy to understand, and powerful to use. From launching TNT and striking lightning to freezing enemies or sending mobs flying into the air, these staves give you new ways to explore, fight, and play.

Great for players who want new abilities and cool mechanics without complex spell systems or UI. Just pick up a staff and let the magic do the rest.

---

### 🪄 Included Staves:

- **🔥 Fire Staff**  
  Shoots a flame that **burns mobs** over time.

- **❄️ Ice Staff**  
  Launches an **ice block** that **slows enemies** and **freezes blocks** on impact.

- **⚡ Lightning Staff**  
  Strikes a **bolt of lightning** at your target location.

- **🌿 Nature Staff**  
  Grants you **positive effects** like **regeneration**, **speed**, and **saturation** when used.

- **💣 TNT Staff**  
  Launches a **flying TNT block** that **explodes on contact**.

- **🌬️ Levitation Staff**  
  Sends mobs **floating into the air** using wind magic.  
  ⚠️ Sometimes it **launches you instead** — but don’t worry, **you get Slow Falling** while holding it.

---

### 🔧 Features:
- **Simple, fun, and survival-friendly**
- Lightweight and **modpack compatible**
- **No armor, no clutter — just magic**

---

### 📦 Crafting Info:
To craft a staff, you’ll need to first find or create its matching **Elemental Core** (like the Fire Core, Ice Core, etc.).  
Each staff recipe requires the **core of its element** — making the crafting feel magical and earned.

---

🪄 Become a mystic. Burn, freeze, boost, and explode your way to magical dominance!
